title: [Enchant] Blessing of Return
description: A new enchantment that lets you keep your items on death
body:
The Blessing of Return is a new enchantment that can be applied to any items with durability. When you die, items enchanted with Blessing of Return will be returned to you at no cost, but there's a catch. The enchantment has a 10% chance to fail. When it fails, the item will still be returned to you but only with 5% of its durability remaining. ## Configuration Configure by using `/function clgd.enchant:return_blessing/settings/menu` ### Options **Damage Percent** - The percent of the item's total durability **Damage Type** - Determines how the damage percent is used.
When `Damage Type` is `Set Percent` the item's damage will be set to equal the `Damage Percent`
When `Damage Type` is `Remove Percent` the item will lose damage equal to `Damage Percent` of the item's total durability **Damage Chance** - the percent chance for the `Damage Percent` to be applied to an enchanted item on death
